listing.title: Pagano Law
listing.description: Complete law firm website redesign and rebuild from Divi to Bricks Builder with dynamic ACF templates, performance improvements, and infrastructure optimization.
listing.result: Faster website, reusable CMS, and simplified long-term management
listing.achievement: Saved the client approximately $1,000 annually by consolidating hosting, domains, and email services
listing.imageAlt: Screenshot preview of the Pagano Law website

pageShowcase.label: Homepage comparison
pageShowcase.title: Old Divi homepage and new Bricks rebuild
pageShowcase.text: A side-by-side desktop view of the original Divi homepage and the rebuilt Bricks Builder experience.

pagano-law.headline: A complete law firm website rebuild with Bricks Builder, better performance, and lower operating costs.
pagano-law.tagline: Redesigned from Divi, rebuilt from scratch in Bricks Builder, and simplified the client's entire website infrastructure.
pagano-law.overview: Pagano Law had an outdated Divi-based website that was difficult to maintain, slower than necessary, and tied to an unnecessarily expensive hosting setup. The project involved a complete redesign and a fresh Bricks Builder development, while also consolidating hosting, domains, email, and website services into a single provider. The result was a faster, easier-to-manage website and approximately $1,000 in annual infrastructure savings.

facts.label: Objective
facts.value: Complete redesign, improve performance, simplify management, and reduce infrastructure costs

facts.label: Project type
facts.value: WordPress redesign and custom Bricks Builder development

challenges.title: Heavy Divi website
challenges.text: The existing Divi Builder website was difficult to maintain, contained unnecessary overhead, and lacked a scalable foundation for future growth.

challenges.title: Scattered infrastructure
challenges.text: Hosting, domains, email, and related services were spread across multiple providers, making management complicated and increasing recurring costs.

challenges.title: Limited editing workflow
challenges.text: The client needed a cleaner CMS experience that allowed content updates without dealing with bulky page-builder structures.

results.title: Complete Bricks Builder rebuild
results.text: The website was redesigned and rebuilt from scratch using Bricks Builder with reusable components, dynamic templates, and a cleaner development architecture.

results.title: Around $1,000 saved annually
results.text: The client's hosting, domain, email, and website services were consolidated into a single provider, eliminating unnecessary premium plans and duplicate subscriptions.

results.title: Simplified long-term maintenance
results.text: The new CMS structure, dynamic templates, and optimized plugin stack make future updates significantly easier while improving overall performance.

pagano-law.performanceNote: The project focused on replacing Divi with a lightweight Bricks Builder architecture, reducing unnecessary assets, improving maintainability, and creating a faster editing experience while lowering long-term infrastructure costs.

branding.title: Professional legal branding with modern editorial styling.
branding.text: The visual identity combines elegant serif typography with a clean sans-serif interface to establish trust, readability, and professionalism throughout the website.
branding.fontMeta: Libre Baskerville is used for headings to reinforce authority, while Inter provides clean, readable body text and interface elements.

desktopPages.name: Attorney Profiles
desktopPages.type: Dynamic team pages powered by ACF

responsiveBenefits: Optimized layouts across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
Dynamic templates reduce repetitive content management.
Cleaner editing workflow for the client.
Lower maintenance costs with fewer plugins and reusable components.
Consolidated infrastructure makes ongoing administration much easier.

testimonial.quote: The new website is dramatically easier to manage, noticeably faster, and consolidating our services into one provider reduced unnecessary yearly expenses.
testimonial.author: Pagano Law

cta.heading: Need a website that's faster and costs less to maintain?
cta.text: Whether you're rebuilding an outdated WordPress site or migrating away from a heavy page builder, I can design, develop, and optimize a solution that's built for long-term growth.

listing.title: Weinberger Aesthetics
listing.description: Premium aesthetic surgery clinic website converted from Figma into a custom Bricks Builder build with dynamic WordPress content and a clean CMS structure.
listing.result: Modern clinic website with flexible CMS and polished responsive layouts
listing.achievement: Converted a full Figma design into a client-manageable Bricks Builder website
listing.imageAlt: Screenshot preview of the Weinberger Aesthetics clinic website

pageShowcase.label: Homepage comparison
pageShowcase.title: Old custom homepage and new Bricks build
pageShowcase.text: A side-by-side desktop view of the previous custom WordPress homepage and the new Bricks Builder implementation.

weinberger-aesthetics.headline: A premium clinic website rebuilt in Bricks Builder from a custom Figma design.
weinberger-aesthetics.tagline: Converted from Figma into a refined Bricks Builder website for a plastic, aesthetic, and hand surgery clinic in Kassel.
weinberger-aesthetics.overview: Weinberger Aesthetics had an existing custom WordPress website that needed to be replaced with a more refined, modern, and easier-to-manage experience. The new design was provided in Figma and converted into a responsive Bricks Builder website with dynamic WordPress sections, reusable layouts, and a cleaner CMS structure. The result is a polished clinic website that presents treatments clearly, supports patient trust, and gives the team a more practical way to manage content.

facts.label: Industry
facts.value: Plastic, aesthetic, and hand surgery clinic

facts.label: Objective
facts.value: Convert Figma design into a responsive Bricks Builder website with flexible content management

facts.label: Project type
facts.value: Custom WordPress rebuild and Figma to Bricks Builder development

challenges.title: Old custom WordPress setup
challenges.text: The previous website was built on a custom WordPress setup that needed a more modern, editable, and scalable structure.

challenges.title: Detailed treatment content
challenges.text: The clinic offers a wide range of surgical and non-surgical treatments, so the content needed to be organized clearly without overwhelming visitors.

challenges.title: Premium medical presentation
challenges.text: The website needed to feel elegant, professional, discreet, and trustworthy while still staying easy to read across all devices.

results.title: Figma to Bricks implementation
results.text: The supplied Figma design was converted into a responsive Bricks Builder website with accurate layouts, spacing, typography, and visual structure.

results.title: Cleaner treatment structure
results.text: Treatment pages and clinic content were organized to make services easier to explore, from aesthetic procedures to hand surgery and medical cosmetic treatments.

results.title: Editable WordPress foundation
results.text: ACF-powered content areas, reusable Bricks sections, and a cleaner plugin stack made the site easier to update and maintain after launch.

weinberger-aesthetics.performanceNote: The build focused on translating the Figma design into a lightweight Bricks Builder structure with reusable sections, clean responsive layouts, organized media, reliable email delivery, and SEO-ready WordPress foundations.

branding.title: A calm, premium visual system for a modern aesthetic clinic.
branding.text: The visual direction uses deep green, soft neutrals, and clean typography to create a discreet, professional, and patient-focused experience.
branding.fontMeta: Source Sans Pro is used across the website for clean readability, polished interface text, and a modern medical aesthetic.

desktopPages.name: About
desktopPages.type: Doctor profile, clinic values, and professional trust

responsiveBenefits: Figma layouts were carefully adapted for desktop, tablet, and mobile screens.
Treatment content stays readable and structured on smaller devices.
Reusable Bricks sections make future page updates easier.
ACF fields support cleaner content management for clinic and treatment information.
The refined visual system creates a consistent premium experience across the site.

testimonial.quote: The new website feels premium, structured, and much easier to manage while presenting our clinic and treatments in a professional way.
testimonial.author: Weinberger Aesthetics
testimonial.meta: Figma to Bricks Builder clinic website

cta.heading: Need a premium clinic website built from Figma?

listing.result: Responsive landing pages with smooth animations and excellent visual fidelity
listing.achievement: Converted complex Figma designs into production-ready frontend components
listing.imageAlt: Screenshot preview of the Studyly website

pageShowcase.label: Delivered pages
pageShowcase.title: Selected Studyly desktop page views

studyly.headline: A pixel-perfect Figma-to-code implementation for an AI-powered education platform.
studyly.tagline: Modern frontend development with responsive layouts, interactive animations, and production-ready HTML components.
studyly.overview: Studyly is an AI-powered mathematics learning platform used by more than 800 schools. The project involved converting detailed Figma designs into responsive HTML, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript while maintaining visual accuracy, smooth interactions, and excellent performance across devices.

facts.label: Objective
facts.value: Convert Figma designs into responsive production-ready frontend

facts.label: Project type
facts.value: Figma to HTML, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript

challenges.title: Pixel-perfect implementation
challenges.text: Every section needed to match the supplied Figma design precisely while remaining fully responsive across all screen sizes.

challenges.title: Interactive user experience
challenges.text: Animations, sliders, media components, and scroll effects had to feel smooth without affecting page performance.

challenges.title: Scalable frontend architecture
challenges.text: The codebase needed reusable components, clean utility classes, and an organized structure for future development.

results.title: Accurate Figma implementation
results.text: Every layout, spacing, typography, and component was translated into responsive HTML with high visual accuracy.

results.title: Modern interactive experience
results.text: GSAP animations, Swiper sliders, media playback, and scroll interactions created a polished user experience.

results.title: Clean developer-friendly code
results.text: The frontend was built with reusable Tailwind utilities and maintainable JavaScript for easy future expansion.

studyly.performanceNote: The frontend focused on lightweight responsive layouts, optimized assets, reusable Tailwind components, and hardware-accelerated animations to deliver a smooth browsing experience.

branding.title: Modern educational design with approachable technology.
branding.text: The interface combines clean typography, spacious layouts, and vibrant blue accents to create a trustworthy and engaging learning experience.
branding.fontMeta: Poppins provides clean geometric typography that improves readability while reinforcing the platform's modern educational identity.

responsiveBenefits: Pixel-perfect layouts across desktop, tablet, and mobile.
Smooth GSAP and scroll-based animations.
Reusable Tailwind components simplify future development.
Optimized media playback using Plyr.
Interactive sliders enhance content presentation.

testimonial.quote: The final implementation matched the Figma designs with excellent responsiveness and smooth interactions across every device.
testimonial.author: Studyly

cta.heading: Need a Figma design turned into production-ready code?
cta.text: I build fast, responsive, pixel-perfect websites using modern frontend technologies and clean, maintainable code.

serveekay.headline: A premium Figma-to-Bricks portfolio website for a product designer.
serveekay.tagline: Converted from Figma into a responsive Bricks Builder WordPress website built to attract startups, founders, and product teams.
serveekay.overview: SerVeekay is a personal portfolio and freelance services website for Waleed, a UI/UX and product designer. The goal was to convert a detailed Figma design into a polished WordPress website using Bricks Builder, while keeping the site responsive, editable, and focused on lead generation. The final website presents services, portfolio projects, pricing options, testimonials, FAQs, and discovery-call CTAs in a clean, conversion-focused structure.

facts.label: Industry
facts.value: UI/UX design and product design services

facts.label: Objective
facts.value: Convert Figma design into a responsive Bricks Builder WordPress website

facts.label: Project type
facts.value: Figma to Bricks Builder WordPress development

challenges.title: Detailed portfolio structure
challenges.text: The website needed to present services, case studies, pricing, testimonials, FAQs, and personal branding without making the page feel crowded.

challenges.title: Strong visual accuracy
challenges.text: The Figma design used custom typography, dark visual sections, gradients, rounded cards, and spacing systems that needed to be implemented accurately in Bricks Builder.

challenges.title: Lead-focused user flow
challenges.text: The site had to guide startup founders and businesses from portfolio browsing toward booking a discovery call or starting a project.

results.title: Figma to Bricks conversion
results.text: The design was converted into a responsive Bricks Builder WordPress website with accurate typography, spacing, layout structure, and visual styling.

results.title: Editable portfolio foundation
results.text: WordPress, ACF, and reusable Bricks sections made portfolio content, service information, and page sections easier to manage.

results.title: Conversion-focused presentation
results.text: Services, pricing, testimonials, portfolio projects, FAQs, and CTAs were structured to support trust-building and lead generation.

serveekay.performanceNote: The build focused on clean Bricks Builder structure, reusable sections, responsive layouts, organized CMS fields, and a lightweight plugin stack for easier long-term maintenance.

branding.title: A bold, premium portfolio style for a product designer.
branding.text: The visual system uses dark backgrounds, warm peach highlights, custom typography, soft gradients, and rounded layouts to create a modern designer-led brand experience.
branding.fontName: Neue Haas Grotesk Display Pro + Bricolage Grotesque
